translations.Starter overview with sample KPIs and ac: Starter overview with sample KPIs and activity placeholders. Replace this view with your own data.
translations.Wire buttons here to create records, ope: Wire buttons here to create records, open lists, or deep links. Use the sidebar for Settings and Documentation.
translations.This app needs OpenRegister to store and: This app needs OpenRegister to store and manage data. Please install OpenRegister from the app store to get started.
translations.User settings will appear here in a futu: User settings will appear here in a future update.
translations.No virtual apps yet — seed `hello-world`: No virtual apps yet — seed `hello-world` should appear after install.
translations.Integrator-only editor: edit the raw JSO: Integrator-only editor: edit the raw JSON manifest below. The visual editor lives in a follow-on release (openbuilt-page-editor).
translations.Paste or edit the JSON manifest here. Se: Paste or edit the JSON manifest here. See @conduction/nextcloud-vue/src/schemas/app-manifest.schema.json for the canonical schema.
translations.openbuilt.editor.help: Integrator-only editor: edit the raw JSON manifest. Visual editor lives in chain spec openbuilt-page-editor.
translations.openbuilt.versionHistory.title: Version history
translations.openbuilt.versionHistory.empty: No versions yet — publish this app to create the first snapshot.
translations.openbuilt.rollback.confirm.title: Roll back to version {version}?
translations.openbuilt.rollback.confirm.body: Rolling back copies this snapshot's manifest onto the current draft. Existing history is preserved (append-only).
translations.openbuilt.diff.title: Manifest diff
translations.openbuilt.diff.empty: Nothing to diff — publish the app first.
